revision_priority: Rewrite the Professional Summary into the required 3-sentence, bold-label format.
Add an explicit bridge in the summary from data-analyst titles to analyst-adjacent internal tooling and automation work.
Resolve the JavaScript source mismatch by adding JavaScript to Skills or rewriting the DiDi project bullet to avoid an unsupported tech mention.
revision_instructions: Update `## Skills` so every technical term used in the experience bullets has a matching source entry. The fastest fix is to add `JavaScript` to the programming stack, because the DiDi project explicitly says "JavaScript console". If you prefer to keep Skills unchanged, rewrite that bullet to use a non-technical phrasing such as "operator console" or "audited web console". Then audit all non-Skills bolding and strip emphasis from qualifier words such as `team-maintained`; preserve bold only for technical terms, core metrics, and the required achievement formatting.
